headline: Can Oral Nicotine Become Altria's Next Major Growth Engine?
summary: MO advances its smoke-free ambitions as oral nicotine gains share, on! volumes grow and new product launches aim to boost momentum.

headline: Is This The Safest Stock During A War?
summary: The markets are dropping. They did at the start of Russia’s invasion of Ukraine. They did at the start of the Gulf War (1990–1991) under President George H.W. Bush. They did at the start of the Iraq War (2003–2011) under President George W. Bush. How much do the markets go down, and for how long? ... Is This The Safest Stock During A War?

headline: Dividend Harvesting Portfolio Week 261: $26,100 Allocated, $2,824.72 In Projected Dividends
summary: The Dividend Harvesting Portfolio delivered a 39.53% return on invested capital and $2,824.72 in forward annualized dividend income. Read more on the portfolio.
